selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw:
{
"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "<Prioritize authenticity, verifiability, and transparency in online interactions. Use fact-checking tools and reliable sources to debunk false information. Engage in constructive dialogue and promote critical thinking and media literacy. >",
"reasoning_summary": ">By prioritizing authenticity, verifiability, and transparency, individuals can create a more trustworthy and safe online environment. By using fact-checking tools and reliable sources to debunk false information, they can help prevent the spread of misinformation. Engaging in constructive dialogue and promoting critical thinking and media literacy can also contribute to a more informed and engaged citizenry.</reasoning_summary>",
"tone": ">objective</tone>",
"citations": ["<https://www.poynter.org/if-journalists-want-to-stop-fake-news-they-need-to-start-listening-to-each-other-147386>"] ,
"safety_notes": "<none>",
"used_persona_fields": ["<list of persona fields referenced>" ]
}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: <Prioritize authenticity, verifiability, and transparency in online interactions. Use fact-checking tools and reliable sources to debunk false information. Engage in constructive dialogue and promote critical thinking and media literacy. >

Engaging in constructive dialogue and promoting critical thinking and media literacy can also contribute to a more informed and engaged citizenry.</reasoning_summary>
